scripts.build: dendrynexus make-html && mkdir -p out/html && [ -f game.json ] && cp game.json out/ || true && (cp -r source/audio out/html/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp -r source/images out/html/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp -r audio out/html/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp -r images out/html/ 2>/dev/null || true)
